title: crassula tetragona subsp. connivens
intro: Crassula tetragona subsp. connivens, also known as "Strangled Fig" or "Trailing Jade", is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crassula tetragona subsp. connivens include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
